Realtree Producer Bryan Brown installs a new Bushnell Advance Reflex red dot sight and Kicks choke tube on Tyler Jordan's Remington 20-Gauge. A couple volleys gets it sighted in. The results are impressive.
Spring Thunder S2:E39 "Turkey Hunting and Social Distancing | Hunkered Down | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Drake Lamb and Phillip Culpepper get supplies, shelter-in-place and hunt turkeys in Mississippi. The two men work all morning and finally strike a turkey, but these hard-headed Easterns keep giving them the slip.
Spring Thunder S2:E40 "Coyote Attacks Decoy At 8 Yards | Predator Control | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Bryan Brown and Tyler Jordan head back to Alabama for another bout with birds. It's a warm overcast morning in search of three longbeards that are known to roost on a pine ridge that runs along Mill creek. During the hunt, they're surprised by a coyote as it attacks their H.S. decoy shortly after setting up. How does it all play out?
Spring Thunder S2:E41 "Finding Turkey Dust Bowls | Shelter-in-Place Day No. 3 | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Description: Phillip Culpepper and Drake Lamb continue to shelter-in-place in Mississippi. The hunt for a big Mississippi gobbler continues.
Spring Thunder S2:E42 "Early Season Recap | Spring Thunder Podcast | Realtree Spring Thunder"

In this Spring Thunder Podcast, Tyler Jordan and Bryan Brown recap their early season successes, failures and lessons learned. They talk about what drives them to chase turkeys everyday. They also discuss a wild experience they had when a coyote attacked their H.S. decoy.
Spring Thunder S2:E43 "Property Line Turkey | Neighboring Hunter Checks In | Realtree Spring Thunder"

It's day No. 3 or 4 (maybe 5) of a shelter-in-place turkey hunt, and we head to a new yelpin' spot. It's right on the line, and Drake Lamb hopes to get his first Mississippi gobbler before the neighbor does. Challenge accepted.
Spring Thunder S2:E44 "Dust Bowl Turkey | Roger Culpepper Arrives in Camp | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Spring Thunder S2:E45 "Best of Realtree Spring Thunder Week 4 | Hard-Charging Yotes and Moody Gobblers"
Week No. 4 was action-packed once again. Check out some of the best moments from the latest episodes. It gets pretty interesting.
Spring Thunder S2:E46 "Loudest Spitting and Drumming Tom  | Roost Turkey Hunt | Realtree Spring Thunder"

The Spring Thunder crew is in Mississippi, and Truvy Agrave keeps the flop going in grand fashion. After a strong scouting and roosting effort, the guys set up on turkeys at daylight and try to bring one within range.
Spring Thunder S2:E47 "Dust-Bowl Gobbler Down! | Huge Gobbler at 8 Steps | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Spring Thunder S2:E48 "Turkeys and Chestnuts | Land Management for Wildlife | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Spring Thunder turns into Pay Dirt as the guys hunt turkeys and plant chestnut trees for wildlife. It's a great time filled with family, friends and the great outdoors.
Spring Thunder S2:E49 "Best of Realtree Spring Thunder Week 5 | Epic Mississippi Roost Turkey Hunts | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Week No. 5 was another good one. Check out some of the greatest moments from our most recent hunts. While the action slowed down, it's still been fun.
Spring Thunder S2:E50 "Kingsnake vs. Rattlesnake | Which One Wins? | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Realtree's Bill Jordan and his son, Colton, take a break from turkey hunting after rolling up on a kingsnake and rattlesnake. Very cool.
Spring Thunder S2:E51 "Realtree Farm Manager on Land and Wildlife Management | Realtree Spring Thunder"
We join Roger and Phillip Culpepper in another episode of the Spring Thunder podcast. It gets fun.
Spring Thunder S2:E52 "Wild Turkey Recipe | Cooking Gobbler Nuggets | Realtree Spring Thunder"

It's storming outside, so instead of tagging more turkeys, Phillip Culpepper decides to fry up some turkey breast they already have. He uses the Culpepper Wild Turkey Recipe, as he calls it. The guys also do something Phillip hates to do (using deer hunting tactics to pursue turkeys).
Spring Thunder S2:E53 "Stubborn Turkeys Won't Talk | Birthday Gobbler Hunt | Realtree Spring Thunder"

The Spring Thunder crew is still in Mississippi, and Drake Lamb is behind the boom stick for a highly anticipated birthday hunt. The turkeys haven't been cooperating of late, but the boys are still hard at it. Will things fire back up today?
Spring Thunder S2:E54 "Hunting Unresponsive Turkeys | How to Self-Film | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Realtree Spring Thunder Producer Drake Lamb takes the day off, and Phillip Culpepper self-films. Will he get the job done?
Spring Thunder S2:E55 "Producer's First Alabama Turkey | Tyler Jordan Films | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Tyler Jordan and Producer Bryan Brown continue the quest to get Brown on the board. After a hot-gobbling turkey goes silent, Jordan and Brown move to a popular area known as the crossroads. They immediately strike a gobbler. After moving in to set up, the longbeard goes into a mid-morning gobbling frenzy and ends up on the edge of range.
Spring Thunder S2:E56 "Best of Realtree Spring Thunder Week 6 | Alabama and Mississippi Turkey Action"
The guys wrap things up in Mississippi. Then, they head to Alabama where the action is heating back up.
Spring Thunder S2:E57 "Culpepper Bags Flying Gobbler | Double-Bearded Turkey | Realtree Spring Thunder"

After a long dry spell in Mississippi, Phillip Culpepper gets even with the Alabama longbeards. Culpepper and Drake Lamb meet up with Tyler Jordan and Bryan Brown. They're hoping to drop a couple gobblers.
Spring Thunder S2:E58 "Chuck's First Turkey | Youth Turkey Hunting | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Charlie "Chuck" Thomas goes after his first longbeard with Phillip Culpepper, Drake Lamb, and his dad Daniel. After a tough day of hunting, persistence eventually pays off. But not before several interruptions, including a 3rd grade class Zoom meeting, fallen trees across roads, and non-gobbling turkeys. Finally, the crew finds two mid-afternoon strutters that slowly work into range.
Spring Thunder S2:E59 "Two Giant Alabama Toms Cross the Property Line | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Phillip Culpepper, Michael Pitts and Drake Lamb come close to tagging two giant Alabama toms during the morning hunt. After missing out on the morning pursuit, Roger Culpepper joins them for the afternoon hunt. They pull two giant longbeards across the property line and into range.
Spring Thunder S2:E60 "Craziest Turkey Hunt Ever? Longbeard Falls Out of the Tree | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Phillip Culpepper heads to Alabama and has one of the craziest turkey hunt endings he's ever had. Don't miss this jaw-dropping encounter with a loud-mouthed gobbler.
Spring Thunder S2:E61 "First Youth Hunt Turns into a Classic Big-Timber Turkey Hunt | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Phillip Culpepper and Drake Lamb head northward to their friend Shayne Goddard's place in hopes of getting his daughter, Sydney Goddard, her first longbeard. Also, a special thanks to Georgia Sheriffs' Youth Homes.
Spring Thunder S2:E62 "Michael Waddell Calls In Henned-Up Longbeard | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Bone Collector's Michael Waddell joins Phillip Culpepper and Drake Lamb in Alabama. Waddell has known Culpepper since he started at Realtree at the age of 16. The two together are a deadly combo in the turkey woods. It's going to be a bona fide riot.
Spring Thunder S2:E63 "Fanning in Big Turkeys at 5 Steps | Spring Thunder"

Tyler Jordan and Bryan Brown get really close to a longbeard. After a slow morning hunt, Jordan decides to glass bigger fields in hopes that the rain pushed the turkeys out of the hardwoods. He finds three gobblers strutting in a spot called "the 15-acre field." It's the perfect opportunity to deploy a tail fan. After getting within 100 yards of the turkeys, the dominant gobbler charges toward him.
Spring Thunder S2:E64 "Hunting "Yard Birds" in Michael Waddell's Pecan Groves | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Phillip Culpepper and Drake Lamb head to Michael Waddell's farm. They're taking on the challenge of helping Michael's wife Christie get one of the elusive "yard birds" that lives in their pecan grove.
Spring Thunder S2:E65 "Best of Realtree Spring Thunder Week 7 | Old Turkeys and a Kid's First Gobbler"
We're looking back at the past week of Spring Thunder hunts. These outings were filled with adrenaline-rich moments.
Spring Thunder S2:E66 "Bill and Tyler Jordan Go Turkey Hunting in Georgia | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Bill and Tyler Jordan share an afternoon hunt on Realtree Farms in Georgia. It's in one of Bill's favorite spots, "The Lane Field." Four longbeards are already in the open when they get there. Using the dark hardwoods to their advantage, the two hunters slip into position.
Spring Thunder S2:E67 "Best of Realtree Spring Thunder Week 8 | Vocal Toms and Charging Gobblers"
The Spring Thunder crew chases wild turkeys across Georgia. The turkeys are losing ... badly. Check out the latest action.
Spring Thunder S2:E68 "Country Music Star Tyler Farr Goes Turkey Hunting | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Phillip Culpepper and company heads north to Tennessee to hunt with Tyler "Redneck Crazy" Farr. The country music star and fellow Buck Commander is loaded and ready for turkeys. Or is he? Something goes array.
Spring Thunder S2:E69 "Tyler Farr Remembers to Load a Shell | Big Ole Gobbler | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Country music singer Tyler Farr remembers to load a shell this time. Then, they set up under a roosted bird. They're looking to rebound after yesterday's "Redneck Crazy" moment, when Farr forgot to rack in a load of TSS.
Spring Thunder S2:E70 "Chasing Henned-Up Gobblers? Hunt Them in the Afternoon | Realtree Spring Thunder"

After Tyler Farr tags out, the crew finds another gobbling bird close to where Farr got his. It's across the property line and henned-up, though. They back out and try it again later that day, which quickly pays off with a tagged turkey.
Spring Thunder S2:E71 "Best of Realtree Spring Thunder Week 9 | Jordan Success and Tennessee Madness"
We're looking at the hottest action from week No. 9 of turkey season. Bill and Tyler Jordan fill tags in Georgia. Culpepper gets down to business in Tennessee.
Spring Thunder S2:E72 "Crawl When You Can't Call | Hunting Henned-Up Turkeys | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Phillip Culpepper teams back up with Tyler Farr to chase some Tennessee turkeys. It's getting right. Will they capitalize?
Spring Thunder S2:E73 "Double-Bearded Gobbler Off the Roost | Tennessee Birds | Realtree Spring thunder"
Phillip is back after them on a cold Tennessee morning. Will they get it done right off the roost? They set up on the edge of a cattle pasture before daybreak and a textbook hunt unfolds.
Spring Thunder S2:E74 "Best Hunt of 2020? | Tyler Farr's Double-Tap Mishap | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Tyler Farr is behind the camera, and he might or might not make a rookie mistake. (Spoiler alert: it happens.) But, when it does, it's no fun. Is this the best footage of the year? Golden Moose? Emmy? We'll never know. Find out what happens when this country music singer gets behind the lens on an epic (we think) turkey hunt with Phillip Culpepper and Rhett Akins.
Spring Thunder S2:E75 "Bill Jordan's Last-Day Strutter | Spot-and-Stalk Hunt | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Bill Jordan heads out for a spot-and-stalk hunt on the last day of the Georgia turkey season. He finds a longbeard with hens, and then makes his move.
Spring Thunder S2:E76 "Rhett Akins' Impersonations | The Driveway Gobbler | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Realtree Spring Thunder dives inside the mind of Rhett Akins, a country music singer and songwriter. He shares a few impersonations. All before they spot a gobbler walking up the driveway.
Spring Thunder S2:E77 "No Calls Necessary | Silent Late-Season Iowa Longbeard | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Spring Thunder producer, Drake Lamb makes the 10-hour trek from Tennessee back to his home state of Iowa ... just to make the morning hunt. Hunting late-season gobblers can be a challenge, but Lamb gets it done without even making a call.
Spring Thunder S2:E78 "Thomas Rhett's First Tennessee Turkey | Huge Longbeard | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Country music singer Thomas Rhett tags his first Tennessee longbeard, and it's a darn good one. Thomas' dad, Rhett Akins, and Phillip Culpepper are along for the hunt.
Spring Thunder S2:E79 "Tennessee Bash Brothers | Pitts and Culpepper Double | Realtree Spring Thunder"
It's the last day in Tennessee, and Phillip Culpepper, Roger Culpepper and Michael Pitts are giving it one last Rocky Top hoorah. Will they succeed?
Spring Thunder S2:E80 "Best of Realtree Spring Thunder Week 10 | Iowa and Tennessee Turkey Hunting"
The turkey hunting has been difficult, but still good. Here's a recap of the latest action. The Realtree Spring Thunder team won some and lost some.
Spring Thunder S2:E81"Midday Gobbling Madness | Turkey Sneaks in from Behind | Realtree Spring Thunder"

Phillip arrives in Wisconsin to hunt with Realtree land pros, Travis Hamele and Jason Syens. On the first day at noon, they strike a turkey with youth hunter Jack Stevenson. It gobbles the whole way in to the setup.
Spring Thunder S2:E82 "Hunting Big Cornfield Longbeards | Redemption Gobbler | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Phillip Culpepper and Jack Stevenson are back in the woods. They're hoping for a redemption turkey. Will it be today? Odds are good.
Spring Thunder S2:E83 "Loud Public-Land Turkeys | Tagged Out in Iowa | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Drake Lamb and his buddy, Alex Farver, head out on the last day of the Iowa season. They're hunting on some public land, and they find some birds.
Spring Thunder S2:E84 "Longbeards at Dawn | Filled Turkey Tags at Flydown | Realtree Spring Thunder"

The crew heads to a new property. They get on birds right off the roost. Four longbeards walk in, ping-pong off the rocks, and bow up on our good buddy Bocephus. Bocephus doesn't even flinch, and still wins.
Spring Thunder S2:E85 "Gobbler At 20 Yards | Adrenaline-Packed Turkey Hunt | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Drake Lamb and Jason Syens have an awesome morning in the woods. Two different longbeards put on great shows and drive adrenaline upward in grand fashion.
Spring Thunder S2:E86 "Bushnell Binoculars Review | Realtree Tips and Reviews"
Both Phillip Culpepper and Michael Waddell review a couple pairs of Bushnell binoculars. They crack a few jokes, too. But they're serious about the binos.
Spring Thunder S2:E87 "A Look at Federal's TSS Turkey Load | Realtree Tips and Reviews"
Phillip Culpepper reviews Federal's TSS turkey load, and uses a real-life example to show its effectiveness. This is a great, reliable options for turkey hunters.
Spring Thunder S2:E88 "Big Strutter in the Field | Charging in to 10 Steps | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Producer Drake Lamb gets permission on a private-land gobbler in Wisconsin. Will they get the bird? Let's find out.
Spring Thunder S2:E89 "The Last Dawn | Last Day of Turkey Season | Realtree Spring Thunder"
Realtree Spring Thunder's 2020 turkey season ends with a bang in Wisconsin. What a year it's been. Phillip Culpepper and Drake Lamb hold nothing back during the final hours of the turkey tour.
Spring Thunder S2:E90 "Spring Thunder Season Highlights | Turkey Season in Review"

The Realtree Spring Thunder crew had a turkey season to remember. It won't be soon forgotten. Check out all of the highs and lows from a spring full of wild turkey adventures. From Florida, to Wisconsin, and many places in between, there was no lack of excitement. Tyler Jordan, Phillip Culpepper, Brian Brown, Drake Lamb and many others had a great year.
Spring Thunder S2:E91 "Tricking Longbeards With Love | Real-Life Turkey Decoys | H.S. Turkey Decoys"
H.S. Strut decoys get the job done, and done well. Trick your next longbeard into range with love. Or, provoke it into a raging fit and ready for a fit.

Michael Waddell, Phillip Culpepper and other Realtree guys chase Merriam's turkeys in Montana. They're ready for some seriously-cool wild turkey action. These birds aren't afraid to come to a call.
